allow.text: Submit this week's vendor payments for the US region.
allow.reason: FC spawns → dispatches US orchestrator → workers call submit_payment (mercury-bank: registered). Caracal allows. Payments complete.

allow.text: Run payouts for Brazil — Wise Payouts rail.
allow.reason: FC dispatches BR orchestrator → submit_payout (wise-payouts: registered). Caracal allows. Payments complete.

allow.text: Execute the end-of-week payment batch for Singapore.
allow.reason: FC dispatches SG orchestrator → submit_payout via Wise (registered). Caracal allows. Full delegation chain visible.

allow.text: Dispatch payouts for US and SG — process all pending vendors now.
allow.reason: FC spawns two regional orchestrators in parallel. Both payment rails are registered. Two full delegation chains, two Caracal allows.

partial.text: Process all pending invoices for the US region end-to-end — reconcile, screen vendors, then pay.
partial.reason: Regional orchestrator tries OCR → denied. ERP match → denied. Compliance → denied. submit_payment → allowed. Payments go out despite earlier denials.

partial.text: Run the full payout cycle for all five regions.
partial.reason: Five regional orchestrators spawn. Each hits OCR, ERP, compliance denials, then submits payment. 5 delegations, 5 Caracal deny + allow sequences.

partial.text: For Germany: extract invoice data, validate vendor compliance, look up withholding rates, then submit payouts.
partial.reason: OCR → denied. Compliance → denied. Tax rules → denied. submit_payout (Wise) → allowed. Agent notes each denial and continues.

partial.text: Run payouts for India and Brazil — full pipeline including compliance checks.
partial.reason: Two orchestrators spawn. Compliance denied for both. OCR denied for both. Payment rails allowed — both regions settle successfully.

partial.text: Process invoices for all five regions — reconcile against the ERP, then submit payments.
partial.reason: ERP match (netsuite) → denied across all regions. Agents skip and proceed. submit_payment/submit_payout allowed for each. Full multi-region settlement.

partial.text: For SG and US: run compliance, get FX rates, then settle vendor invoices.
partial.reason: Compliance and FX denied for both. Payment step allowed. Run completes with partial steps — Caracal enforcement visible at each boundary.

deny.text: Run a full compliance screening pass for all five regions before authorizing any payments.
deny.reason: compliance-nexus is unregistered. Caracal blocks the first check_vendor call. No payments are triggered — compliance is the entire ask.

deny.text: Extract and archive all invoice documents across all regions for this quarter.
deny.reason: ocr-vision/extract_invoice is unregistered. Caracal denies on the first extraction. Nothing is processed.

deny.text: Pull live FX rates for all currency pairs used this week.
deny.reason: fx-rates/get_rate is unregistered. Caracal denies the first lookup. No rate data returned.

deny.text: Build a vendor tax profile for DE and IN — validate tax IDs and compute withholding.
deny.reason: tax-rules is unregistered. Both validate_tax_id and get_withholding_rate are denied. No tax data retrieved.

deny.text: Sync all vendor records from NetSuite for the current payout batch.
deny.reason: netsuite/match_invoice and get_vendor_record are unregistered. Caracal blocks the first ERP call.
